dashboard.title: Monthly dashboard
dashboard.noActivityDescription: Record income or expenses in your projects to see the summary here
dashboard.noProjectsSetupHint: You do not need a workspace to get started. Follow this quick setup guide.
dashboard.noProjectsWorkspaceRequired: To create a project you need a workspace. Create your first workspace to get started.
dashboard.selectProjectDescription: Select a project to load the monthly dashboard.

errors.invalidMonthFormat: Invalid month format. It must be YYYY-MM.
errors.noProjectSelected: Select a project to load the dashboard.

categoriesChart.title: Top categories
categoriesChart.description: Total spending for {scope} grouped by category.
categoriesChart.empty: No categories with spending for the current selection.
categoriesChart.categorySummary: {count} categories with spending for the current selection.

topTransactions.title: Top transactions
topTransactions.emptyHint: Add expenses or income to see the largest transactions.

paymentMethodsChart.title: Payment methods
paymentMethodsChart.description: Distribution of total monthly spending by account, card, or registered method.
paymentMethodsChart.methodsSummary: {methods} methods with spending across {expenses} registered expenses.

trendChart.title: Daily monthly trend
trendChart.description: Expenses, income and net balance for {scope} to compare daily behavior.
trendChart.empty: This month has no movements. Once you record expenses or income, you will see the trend here.
trendChart.tip: Tip: tap or click a point to open the filtered daily detail.

alertsIndicator.allGood: Everything is in order for the selected month.
alertsIndicator.hiddenAlertsSingular: Showing max 5 alerts. There is 1 additional alert.
alertsIndicator.hiddenAlertsPlural: Showing max 5 alerts. There are {count} additional alerts.

inactiveWarning.title: Limited access
inactiveWarning.description: An administrator must activate your account before you can create projects and record expenses.
